name: IGEL OS 12 + Citrix readiness
description: Readiness baseline for IGEL endpoints used with Citrix Workspace.

checks.title: Root CA must be present
checks.remediation: Install approved root certificate bundle via UMS.

checks.title: Root CA must exist in certificate details
checks.remediation: Verify the root CA is present in the expected trust store.

checks.title: Root CA must not expire soon
checks.remediation: Renew or replace the certificate before expiry.

checks.title: Citrix Workspace must be installed
checks.remediation: Install Citrix Workspace for the target platform.

checks.title: Citrix Workspace must meet minimum version
checks.remediation: Upgrade Citrix Workspace to the approved baseline.
